title: Ubiquiti UACC-UK-Ultra-Panel-Antenna
description: UK Ultra Panel Antenna is a specially designed dual-band sector antenna with 90° beamwidth and 10 dBi gain in the 2.4 GHz band and 15 dBi in the 5 GHz band. It is intended for installation in combination with a UniFi access point UK-Ultra (UniFi Swiss Knife Ultra). Thanks to the sophisticated design, it is simply slid onto the access point and secured. Due to the IPx6 certification and the use of UV stable polycarbonate , it is possible to install the antenna in outdoor areas and thus ensure…
